title_en: Response to Realizing Management with Awareness of Cost of Capital and Stock Price – Update
translation_en_brief: On 14 May 2026, Fujisash Co., Ltd. announced an update to its cost-of-capital and stock-price-conscious management framework. The board of directors approved measures to advance this initiative, with detailed specifications provided in an attached document. The filing does not disclose specific numeric targets, KPI metrics, or implementation timelines on the first two pages; full details are contained in the supplementary material.
